g.text: G4 The light is loneliest at 4 AM — attention-seeking mirrors the traffic

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #e8a23d; stroke-width: 2.6; stroke-linecap: square

g.text: Aggression averaged per hour across 217K tuning cycles (Feb 11 – Mar 2); grey area = average pedestrians per hour. The two curves are in opposite phase: the urge to attract peaks exactly when the street is empty.
